text:
This does need merging; the current version of mu4e in ports (1.8.13) seems broken with the current version of Emacs (30.1).  Trying to send mail returns the following error:

[mu4e] Message sent
error in process sentinel: async-when-done: Invalid read syntax: "#<"
error in process sentinel: Invalid read syntax: "#<"
